channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Princeton's Sayash Kapoor will join the UC Berkeley School of Information as an Assistant Professor in 2027
item.description: He is recruiting PhD students focused on frontier AI evaluation
item.content:encoded:
He is recruiting PhD students focused on frontier AI evaluation

Original source: https://cruxevals.com/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/xink08p5

  • Views: 8,519
  • Likes: 205
  • Bookmarks: 25
  • Quotes: 3
  • Replies: 31
  • Posts: 10

Top authors

  • Diyi Yang
  • Niloofar ✈️ icml
  • Amin Karbasi
  • Sayash Kapoor
  • Iason Gabriel
@sayashk @benediktstroebl Congratulations, Sayash!!

item.title: Google DeepMind releases Gemma 4 technical report, detailing multimodal open models up to 31B parameters
item.description: The 12B variant uses an encoder-free architecture for raw audio.
item.content:encoded:
The 12B variant uses an encoder-free architecture for raw audio.

Original source: https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02770

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/0xnizees

  • Views: 49,309
  • Likes: 800
  • Bookmarks: 275
  • Quotes: 9
  • Replies: 32
  • Posts: 10

Top authors

  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • Petar Veličković
  • Omar Sanseviero 🇫🇷 @RAISE Paris
  • Mathieu Blondel
  • elie
Happy to share we just published Gemma 4 technical report! Take a look

item.title: China considers restricting foreign access to domestic frontier AI models from Alibaba and ByteDance
item.description: The proposed rules mirror US export controls on critical technology.
item.content:encoded:
The proposed rules mirror US export controls on critical technology.

Original source: https://ii.inc/the-last-economy/chapter-16#future-two-the-great-fragmentation

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/nk2jm6dw

  • Views: 65,266
  • Likes: 356
  • Bookmarks: 48
  • Quotes: 9
  • Replies: 38
  • Posts: 8

Top authors

  • Emad
  • Nathan Benaich
  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • Alexander Doria
  • Zephyr
Reuters retards were spreading bullshit again

item.title: UMA Robots founder Rémi Cadene reveals Prototype Version 0 humanoid robot built in nine months
item.description: The Paris-assembled robot features claw grippers and wheeled lower legs
item.content:encoded:
The Paris-assembled robot features claw grippers and wheeled lower legs

Original source: https://x.com/RemiCadene/status/2074442725814878510

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/8jcms1wn

  • Views: 26,335
  • Likes: 296
  • Bookmarks: 70
  • Quotes: 17
  • Replies: 31
  • Posts: 15

Top authors

  • Thomas Wolf
  • Chris Paxton
@RemiCadene @UMA_Robots 🔥🔥🔥

item.title: A viral Suno-generated Drake parody satirizes developer frustrations with Claude's context windows, API keys, and code rewrites
item.description: The track 'Claude's Plan' compares Anthropic's model against OpenAI's o3.
item.content:encoded:
The track 'Claude's Plan' compares Anthropic's model against OpenAI's o3.

Original source: https://x.com/immasiddx/status/2074152481555386804

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/cvfe1vwq

  • Views: 29,775
  • Likes: 430
  • Bookmarks: 137
  • Quotes: 5
  • Replies: 22
  • Posts: 2

Top authors

  • Michela Paganini
  • Chubby♨️
@immasiddx This is so peak

item.title: DeepSeek is developing a custom inference chip to reduce its reliance on Nvidia and Huawei hardware
item.description: The company's founder Liang Wenfeng has resumed hiring chip-design engineers.
item.content:encoded:
The company's founder Liang Wenfeng has resumed hiring chip-design engineers.

Original source: https://www.reuters.com/world/china/chinas-deepseek-developing-its-own-ai-chip-sources-say-2026-07-07/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/t0t51kda

  • Views: 63,110
  • Likes: 272
  • Bookmarks: 51
  • Quotes: 2
  • Replies: 18
  • Posts: 6

Top authors

  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • Andrew Curran
  • Zephyr
Verisilicon to the moon

item.title: Remi Cadene, UMA Robots co-founder, reveals Northstar, a general-purpose humanoid robot designed for embodied AI
item.description: A promotional video shows a static 3D rendering of the design.
item.content:encoded:
A promotional video shows a static 3D rendering of the design.

Original source: https://x.com/RemiCadene/status/2074442439142609237

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/wrzxc3lp

  • Views: 18,393
  • Likes: 247
  • Bookmarks: 39
  • Quotes: 12
  • Replies: 20
  • Posts: 10

Top authors

  • Julien Chaumond
  • Pierre Sermanet
@RemiCadene @UMA_Robots can we buy the clothes as a standalone item?

item.title: Google DeepMind's Feryal Behbahani says the company is hiring researchers to build Gemini agent post-training capabilities
item.description: The open roles are based in London and Mountain View.
item.content:encoded:
The open roles are based in London and Mountain View.

Original source: https://www.google.com/about/careers/applications/jobs/results/130223234522981062-research-scientist-agent-post-training-deepmind

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/388fsjll

  • Views: 68,056
  • Likes: 518
  • Bookmarks: 359
  • Quotes: 2
  • Replies: 20
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Feryal
  • Jack Parker-Holder
10/10 would recommend working with Feryal she’s an amazing researcher and lead

item.title: Patrick O'Shaughnessy releases second Invest Like the Best podcast with Jeremy Giffon, covering Silicon Valley culture and private markets
item.description: The episode analyzes private market trends and secret Silicon Valley philosophies.
item.content:encoded:
The episode analyzes private market trends and secret Silicon Valley philosophies.

Original source: https://x.com/patrick_oshag/status/2074463452392030670

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/3s84zi7k

  • Views: 92,260
  • Likes: 375
  • Bookmarks: 570
  • Quotes: 12
  • Replies: 12
  • Posts: 2

Top authors

  • Will Manidis
  • Patrick OShaughnessy
its impossible to overstate how formative jeremy giffon thought has been for all of us.

item.title: Emad Mostaque says Zenith agent harness lifted GPT-5.5 to first place on Frontier SWE benchmark
item.description: The harness optimizes GPT-5.5's environment to outperform Claude Fable.
item.content:encoded:
The harness optimizes GPT-5.5's environment to outperform Claude Fable.

Original source: https://lilianweng.github.io/posts/2026-07-04-harness/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/gs9h751b

  • Views: 16,304
  • Likes: 78
  • Bookmarks: 80
  • Replies: 11
  • Posts: 4

Top authors

  • hardmaru
  • Emad
  • Fabian Pedregosa
This blog is a great review of the current environment on self-improvement We leveraged a number of things here for our harness of harnesses, Zenith, which takes normal models above Fable level on the hardest tasks https://ii.inc/blog/post/zenith
